## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Scope

- Module(s) touched:
- Risk level: low / medium / high

## Validation

- [ ] Builds successfully in Xcode
- [ ] Relevant user flow tested manually
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or local paths introduced
- [ ] Docs/changelog updated if behavior changed

## Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)

Add screenshots or logs to help reviewers.

## Checklist

- [ ] Small, focused change
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`fix/...`, `feat/...`, `docs/...`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
